user.title: Siemens S7 PLC
user.description: Enter your PLC connection details. For Tags, use PLC4X syntax ('DB1.DBD0:REAL', 'M10.5:BOOL') or nodeS7 syntax ('DB1,R0', 'M10.5', 'IW22') — separate multiple tags with newlines or semicolons.

data.protocol: Protocol (AUTO = probe S7CommPlus then fall back to legacy; LEGACY for S7-300/400; S7COMMPLUS forces modern)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the PLC. Check host, port, rack, slot, and tag addresses.
error.invalid_tags: One or more tag addresses could not be parsed. Check the syntax.

write_tag.name: Write tag
write_tag.description: Write a value to a PLC tag.

pulse_tag.name: Pulse tag
pulse_tag.description: Write True, wait, write False — for momentary bit commands.

tag.name: Tag
tag.description: BOOL tag address (PLC4X or nodeS7 syntax).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to hold True before resetting, in seconds.
